title: Hybrid API Options
description: Optional external-service evaluator configuration for SDK optimize requests. This bundle replaces user-facing hybrid_api execution-mode selection and is meaningful only when an external evaluator is configured.

transport_type.description: Transport used to call the external evaluator. auto lets the SDK choose the available transport.

batch_size.description: Number of evaluations sent in one request.

batch_parallelism.description: Maximum number of evaluator batches in flight at once.

keep_alive.description: Whether the SDK should keep the external evaluator connection warm.

heartbeat_interval.description: Seconds between external evaluator heartbeat checks.

timeout.description: Optional evaluator request timeout in seconds. null uses the SDK default.

auth_header.description: Optional authorization header value or secret reference used for evaluator calls.

auto_discover_tvars.description: Whether the SDK should ask the external evaluator to discover tunable variables.
